jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Croma - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Croma. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Croma:
Croma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma!
